form.formComment: Last start 4th (10m Fr6) over 2698m at this track beaten 10 m by Triedtotellya (3:22.40) in NR 70 or better on April 4 at $51. At the start before 6th (FT Sr1) over 2500m at Burnie beaten 14 m by Fleetwood Rock (3:13.70) in No NR on March 13 at $8.80. Draws the pegs and can bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (10m Fr6) over 2698m at this track beaten 10 m by Triedtotellya (3:22.40) in NR 70 or better on April 4 at $51. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted inwards shortly after the start resulting in Ray Dan being checked.
Obtained an inside run, when Mr Bondi hung out.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1680m at this track, beaten a head by The Chancer (2:01.80) in NR 70 to 79 on February 15 at $5. Will be right in the thick of things.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1680m at this track, beaten a head by The Chancer (2:01.80) in NR 70 to 79 on February 15 at $5. Will be right in the thick of things.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 10th (10m Fr3) over 2698m at this track, beaten 22 m by Triedtotellya (3:22.40) in NR 70 or better on April 4 at $41. The run before 6th (Fr5) over 2200m at this track beaten 19 m by Lougle (2:47.60) in NR 60 to 69 on March 22 at $31. Worth another chance. A return to form is on the cards.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 10th (10m Fr3) over 2698m at this track, beaten 22 m by Triedtotellya (3:22.40) in NR 70 or better on April 4 at $41. The run before 6th (Fr5) over 2200m at this track beaten 19 m by Lougle (2:47.60) in NR 60 to 69 on March 22 at $31. Worth another chance. A return to form is on the cards.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began badly. Suffered a flat tyre and was retired from the event.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second after showing early speed, behind Cuzzy Bro at Hobart over 2090m in a NR 64 to 80 on March 25 at $3.40. Then a handy effort when a close second after showing early speed, behind Major Lester at this track over 2200m in a NR 65 to 69 on April 4 at $3. Same draw this time and looks one of the main hopes again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out in the back straight and on the final turn.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (10m Fr4) over 2698m at this track beaten 18 m by Triedtotellya (3:22.40) in NR 70 or better on April 4 at $51. Before that, 4th (Fr4) over 1680m at this track beaten 14 m by Lougle (2:01.20) in NR 65 to 74 on March 29 at $12. This looks a nice assignment so watch for a better run.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, was well back in the run when 8th (Fr6) over 1680m at this track, beaten 30 m by Lougle (2:01.20) in NR 65 to 74 on March 29 at $81. Before that 11th (Sr2) over 2200m at this track beaten 30 m by Lougle (2:47.60) in NR 60 to 69 on March 22 at $91. Hard to have on those efforts.
